scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && npm install && npm run dev
scripts.dev:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm start
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:backend: cd backend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.setup: npm run setup:backend && npm run setup:frontend
scripts.deploy: npm run deploy:backend && npm run deploy:frontend
